claim_boundary: Compares software gating/accounting modes over existing artifacts; not new QPU evidence. Quality fields are intentionally split to avoid comparing raw target fidelity against governed software scores.

full_aegis.quality_note: Do not collapse these fields into one mean quality column. raw_target_quality is measured from GHZ/count data; accepted_result_quality is the target quality after gating; governed_quality_score is a stricter software score; resource_adjusted_quality is accepted_result_quality weighted by accepted results per tracked shot.

no_anchor_gate.quality_note: Do not collapse these fields into one mean quality column. raw_target_quality is measured from GHZ/count data; accepted_result_quality is the target quality after gating; governed_quality_score is a stricter software score; resource_adjusted_quality is accepted_result_quality weighted by accepted results per tracked shot.
